---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AlphaPeek
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that AlphaPeek doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Scope check

AlphaPeek v0.1 is intentionally small (wallet/token hover card on X/Twitter via a
Worker proxy). Before filing, please skim [`docs/ROADMAP.md`](../../docs/ROADMAP.md)
to see if this is already planned for v0.2/v0.3 or deliberately out of scope.

- [ ] I've checked the roadmap and this isn't already planned.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples.
